steps.assistant_text: Three logic bugs: flags at self[0x13DC + i] (byte-indexed, not i*104); bit-clear stores 0 / rc!=0 stores nothing (was inverted); counter reset AFTER the loop, skipped by the early return. Levers: decl order (i, counter before slot_mask) homes the mask at sp+0x4F — named locals reserve frame homes in decl order even when register-resident; array-IXA ((GlRow104*)self)[i] for base-first addu.
